name: Pat's Friendship Cake Brandied Starter
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups Brandy OR Peach brandy OR Apricot brandy
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a clean non-metal bowl.
2. Stir gently.
3. Cover and let stand at room temperature for 3 weeks.
4. During the 3-week period, stir the fruit twice a week.
5. Serve the fruit over ice cream or pound cake.
6. Reserve at least 1 cup of starter at all times.
7. To replenish the starter, add 1 cup sugar and one of the fruits (peach, apricot, or brandy) each time you use it.
8. Cover and let stand at room temperature for 3 days before using.
Yield: 6 cups
See recipe for Friendship Fruitcake.
